title: ARCHIVED - T1 Income tax package for 2018 - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED - Income tax package for 2018

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
- File online - There are a variety of software products to meet your needs, some of which are free.
- Filing online is fast, easy, and secure. Let us help you through it. For more information about online filing, go to Get ready to file your 2018 income tax return .
When preparing your tax return, you may need to refer to other guides, or complete some schedules and other forms that have more detailed information. To help you determine which you will need, see Other guides, schedules and forms you may need to complete your income tax and benefit return .
Select the province or territory in which you resided on December 31, 2018 . If you were a deemed resident or non-resident of Canada in 2018, see 2018 Income Tax Package (for non-residents and deemed residents of Canada) .
- Newfoundland and Labrador
- Northwest Territories
- Prince Edward Island
- Non-residents and deemed residents of Canada
Order the 2018 Income Tax package
Order the 2018 Non-resident guide
- All about your tax return Information to get, complete, and send in your tax return, including payments, refunds, and more.
- Where to mail your paper T1 return Find out where you can deliver or mail your T1 income tax return.
- Tax packages for all tax years Includes guides, T1 returns, related schedules, as well as provincial or territorial schedules, information, and forms (except Quebec).

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
